summary: The session focused on adding a getCurrentStep() method to the SOPEngine class, which was successfully implemented and tested, confirming it returns the current SOPStep object or null.

decisions.description: Add getCurrentStep() method to the SOPEngine class
decisions.rationale: This method is necessary to expose the current SOPStep that the SOPEngine tracks internally, and it is already called in other parts of the code.

decisions.description: Run tests after implementing the getCurrentStep() method
decisions.rationale: Running tests ensures that the new method works correctly and does not break any existing functionality.

key_file_changes.summary: Added the getCurrentStep() method to expose the current SOPStep object.
